docket_entries.description: ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER. THE COURT DENIES YOUR REQUEST BECAUSE IT IS INCOMPLETE. ORDER IS FOR ADMINISTRATIVE PURPOSES. PLAINTIFF HAS PAID COURT FEES PRIOR TO DENIAL ORDER.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,149.92 (FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & DECISION) FILED BY KHALID, AYESHA AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRILLO, JORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PAYMENT OF WAIVED FEES (JAN-26-2016 SMALL CLAIMS > 1500, <= 5000) (CONFIDENTIAL) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KHALID, AYESHA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHALID, AYESHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRILLO, JORGE $754.26 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $804.26, DEDUCTIONS FROM THE $1,100.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT INCLUDE: $90.00 CLEANING/REPAIR WINDOW SCREENS, $315.00 PLAINTIFF'S SHARE OF CARPET REPLACEMENT. DEFENDANT ALSO OWES PLAINTIFF $59.26 FOR COMCAST. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.08 AGAINST THE JUDGMENT, AM AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRILLO, JORGE
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHALID, AYESHA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED JAN-27-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRILLO, JORGE
